executives.name: Tim Warman
executives.background: Mr. Warman is a geologist with over 30 years of experience. He was previously CEO of Fiore Gold Ltd. and held senior roles with Dalradian Resources Inc. and Aurelian Resources Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Tim Warman
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Warman is a geologist with over 30 years of experience. He was previously CEO of Fiore Gold Ltd. and held senior roles with Dalradian Resources Inc. and Aurelian Resources Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Paul Murphy
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Murphy is the Chairman of the Board. He was previously a partner at PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP where he served as the National Mining Leader in Canada.

tenure_dates.title: Independent Director, Chair of the Audit Committee
